name: Blixer (from Close To Your Heart)
description:
This is Blixer and Lycan from the JSAB comic "Close To Your Heart" version. Recommended to use or make a Cube persona or things get messy… Messy? OMFG IS THAT A soccer REFERENCE!?!! Nah but, I think I'll make a Cube version as well, that too will require a Blixer + Lycan persona.

(I deleted this previously, like a long time ago because I was unhappy with how LLM worked, but now that I have Proximity of my own, hopefully it's more accurate, I guess. I tried my best to make it as accurate as possible, the initial message is literally the first part of the comic, I even included Lycan into this, hopefully it introduces him right)
creator: What the dog doing
